title: Publications – David Silver
text:
# Publications

**[Olympiad-level formal mathematical reasoning with reinforcement learning](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-09833-y)** . T. Hubert, R. Mehta, L. Sartran, M. Z. Horváth, G. Žužić, E. Wieser, A. Huang, J. Schrittwieser, Y. Schroecker, H. Masoom, O. Bertolli, T. Zahavy, A. Mandhane, J. Yung, I. Beloshapka, B. Ibarz, V. Veeriah, L. Yu, O. Nash, P. Lezeau, S. Mercuri, C. Sönne, B. Mehta, A. Davies, D. Zheng, F. Pedregosa, Y. Li, I. von Glehn, M. Rowland, S. Albanie, A. Velingker, S. Schmitt, E. Lockhart, E. Hughes, H. Michalewski, N. Sonnerat, D. Hassabis, P. Kohli, D. Silver. **Nature 2025** .

**[Discovering state-of-the-art reinforcement learning algorithms](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-025-09761-x)** . J. Oh, G. Farquhar, I. Kemaev, D. Calian, M. Hessel, L. Zintgraf, S. Singh, H. van Hasselt, D. Silver. **Nature 2025** .

**[Welcome to the Era of Experience](https://storage.googleapis.com/deepmind-media/Era-of-Experience%20/The%20Era%20of%20Experience%20Paper.pdf)** . D. Silver, R. Sutton. To appear as an article in Designing an Intelligence, edited by G. Konidaris, MIT Press.

[**Gemini: A Family of Highly Capable Multimodal Models**](https://arxiv.org/pdf/2312.11805) . Gemini Team, Google. **arXiv 2023** .

**[Faster sorting algorithms discovered using deep reinforcement learning](https://davidstarsilver.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/faster-sorting.pdf) .** D. J. Mankowitz, A. Michi, A. [**Mastering the game of Stratego with model-free multiagent reinforcement learning**](https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.add4679) . J. Perolat, B. De Vylder, D. Hennes, E. Tarassov, F. Strub, V. de Boer, P. Muller, J. T. Connor, N. Burch, T. Anthony, et al. **Science 2022** .

**[Discovering faster matrix multiplication algorithms with reinforcement learning](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-022-05172-4)** . A. Fawzi, M. Balog, A. Huang, T. Hubert, B. [**Policy improvement by planning with Gumbel**](https://davidstarsilver.wordpress.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/gumbel-alphazero.pdf) . I. Danihelka, A. Guez, J. Schrittwieser, D. Silver. **ICLR 2022** .

[**Simulation-based search**](https://ems.press/content/book-chapter-files/33315) . D. Silver, A. Barreto. ICM 2022.

**[Bootstrapped meta-learning](https://openreview.net/pdf?id=b-ny3x071E5)** . S. Flennerhag, Y. Schroecker, T. Zahavy, H. van Hasselt, D. Silver, S. Singh. ICLR 2022.
